backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing product management (CRUD operations with admin-only access), user profile management, and role-based authorization using MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to investigating and fixing loading issues in ProductBrowse, SwipeableGallery, useQueries hooks, LoadingTimeout component, and backend actor initialization.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files, describing their functionality, loading state handling, and integration patterns.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'Fashion Forum', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router setup defining routes for product browsing, product detail, and admin pages, plus conditional ProfileSetup modal display logic that waits for identity initialization and profile fetch completion.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon, error message for insufficient admin privileges, and a button to return to the products page.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering a button group with 'All' option and dynamic category buttons, using variant styling to indicate selected category.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Collapsible category section with a clickable thumbnail that expands to reveal a grid of product images, each with individual loading states using useImageLoader hook and skeleton/spinner loaders.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with authentication, navigation (admin link, user profile display), and footer. Handles Internet Identity login/logout and integrates with React Query for state management.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Reusable loading component that displays a spinner initially and shows a timeout alert with retry option after a configurable delay. Provides user feedback for slow or failed loading operations.
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Displays a single Meesho product image as a clickable link with hover effects (scale, overlay with 'Look Out →' text). Uses lazy loading and shows spinner during image load.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product thumbnail, name, price, category badge, and optional Pinterest pin indicator. Links to product detail page with hover effects and lazy image loading.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID. Uses react-hook-form for validation and state management.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first login. Cannot be dismissed and saves profile data via mutation hook with error handling.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: Image gallery with swipe/drag navigation supporting touch and mouse gestures. Displays product images with navigation arrows, image counter, dots indicator, and external Meesho link with promotional image.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Carousel component displaying multiple watch product images with navigation controls and a clickable 'Look Out' icon linking to Meesho. Uses lazy loading for all images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook for loading images with retry logic, fallback support, and loading/error state management for both successful and failed image loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using @dfinity/auth-client with delegation identity management and configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, products, and admin status with toast notifications and automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that detects left/right swipe gestures on both touch and mouse events with configurable threshold and callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes using a warm neutral palette suitable for fashion e-commerce, plus typography settings for Playfair Display and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with CRUD operations, access control checks, loading states, and a table/dialog UI for adding, editing, and deleting products.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Content truncated in input; unable to provide summary.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with hero section, category filtering, swipeable gallery, and promotional sections. Uses useGetAllProducts hook to fetch and display products with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID using useGetProduct hook. Displays product image, name, price, description, category badge, and Pinterest link with loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography, container queries, animations, and custom font families (Inter and Playfair Display).
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a loading issue investigation with four feature requests focused on debugging infinite loading states, query hooks, timeout components, and backend actor initialization.
